# scannerDevice(_:didScanTo:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the client when the scanner receives the requested scan progress notification and a band of data is sent for each notification received.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func scannerDevice(_ scanner: ICScannerDevice, didScanTo data: ICScannerBandData)
```

## Discussion

In memory transfer mode, this method sends a band of the size selected by the client using the [doc://com.apple.imagecapturecore/documentation/ImageCaptureCore/ICScannerDevice/maxMemoryBandSize] property.

## Performing a Scan

- **scannerDevice(_:didCompleteOverviewScanWithError:)**: Tells the client when the scanner completes an overview scan.
- **scannerDevice(_:didCompleteScanWithError:)**: Tells the client when the scanner completes a scan.
- **scannerDevice(_:didScanTo:)**: Tells the client when the scanner receives the requested scan.
